summary.clm_r6_blocker_reason: No H100 exposed to this Mac; ubu (RTX 5070) SSH still offline; ubu2 RTX 5070 driver missing; hetzner is CPU-only — not an H100 node. HEXA_REMOTE=1 dispatch cannot find an NVIDIA target.
unblock_paths: Path A (fastest, no H100 required): install nvidia-driver-580 on ubu2 (has RTX 5070 hw, online) — reruns CLM r6 smoke on 5070 instead of H100.
Path B: restore ubu (192.168.50.119) network/sshd — physical access likely needed since both :22 and :2222 unreachable and tailscale down.
Path C: provision an actual H100 (Hetzner AX102 at 157.180.8.154 is CPU-only; need separate GPU-bearing box — e.g. Hetzner GEX44/GPU cloud or RunPod).
